rule: Use only for sourced production facts. Never infer a condition from costume appearance, location imagery, or performer reputation.

terms.athletic-performance: Sustained sport, dance, running, fighting, or comparable exertion in the designed role.
terms.cold: Verified cold-weather, refrigerated, or cold-water work.
terms.constrained-mobility: The design materially restricted ordinary movement.
terms.extended-application: A documented unusually long makeup, prosthetic, or costume application.
terms.full-body-enclosure: The performer worked substantially enclosed by a suit or costume.
terms.heat: Verified hot environment or heat burden while performing in the design.
terms.restricted-breathing: The design materially restricted breathing or ventilation.
terms.stunt-movement: Stunt or hazardous movement performed in the design.
terms.suspension-or-harness: Wire, flying, suspension, or harness work performed in the design.
terms.voice-strain: Documented vocal strain or unusual sustained vocal demand.
terms.water: Submerged, wet, rain, or water-tank performance in the design.
terms.other: A sourced condition that cannot honestly be represented by another controlled term.
